title: Rules governing eligibility for educational benefits
doc_html:
§290.  Rules governing eligibility for educational benefits

The department of veterans affairs shall provide rules and regulations governing the standards of eligibility of applicants for benefits under R.S. 29:288.  These standards shall conform to the entrance requirements of the several colleges and universities of this state.
doc_text:
§290.  Rules governing eligibility for educational benefits
The department of veterans affairs shall provide rules and regulations governing the standards of eligibility of applicants for benefits under R.S. 29:288.  These standards shall conform to the entrance requirements of the several colleges and universities of this state.
